subject: [PATCH v2 03/21] nfsd: fix netlink dumpit error handling for rpc_status_get

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch fixes an error handling issue in the NFS daemon's netlink dump functionality for rpc_status_get. When nla_put operations fail, a partial message is left in the skb without canceling it, causing the netlink dump infrastructure to treat it as a fatal error and abort the entire dump. The patch corrects this by canceling the partial message on all nla_put failure paths and paginating when possible rather than returning a fatal error.
